directive_events.owner_directive: Direction B implemented in TerminalView.tsx: delayed settle full-refresh after resize/re-show to clear alt-screen ghost residue; immediate last-good-frame repaint on re-show to kill the black gap; plus a manual refresh (↻) button. Tests updated. CHANGELOG entry added.

docs_events.rationale: Behavioural bugfix + small UI affordance in an existing component (ADR-034 terminal); no architectural decision. spec:No contract/schema/API change; the fix is host-side render timing. user-docs:No user-facing doc covers terminal internals; the ↻ button is self-describing via its tooltip.

owner_directive: Fix embedded PTY terminal ghosting + black-screen (regressed under Claude Code fullscreen/alt-screen mode) via Direction B: keep xterm DOM renderer, fix resize-settle + re-show repaint timing; and add a manual refresh button in the terminal GUI so users can self-unstick.
